inline_comments.message:
The overall idea is ok but this code could fail with KeyError due to lack of input data validation. I'd suggest two options:

1.enclose this section in 'try' clause and catch KeyError exception and produce error msg and fail

2.(preferred by me) add "nargs" parameter to "parser.add_argument('--add-metadata',(...)" call with value of 2; then parse_args() will succeed only if "--add-metadata key val" is passed failing fast if only key will be passed (so early data validation); it will also produce list for you automatically so no splitting needed afterwards. Just adjust 'default' accordingly then and the condition in 92.

Even prettier would be

    if len(metadata):
        build_info['Build_info'].update({[metadata[0]]: metadata[1]})

but it's ok :)
